name: Postman
description: Inspect and manage Postman APIs, collections, and workspaces
description_zh: 检查和管理 Postman API、集合和工作空间

auth.help_text: Get your API key from Postman Account Settings → API Keys
auth.help_text_zh: 从 Postman 账户设置 → API Keys 获取

name: QiChaCha
description: Query Chinese company registrations, risk profiles, IP, operations, and executive data
description_zh: 查询中国企业工商登记、风险画像、知识产权、经营和高管信息

mcp_config.name: qcc-company
mcp_config.description: QiChaCha - company registrations, risk, IP, operations, executives

auth.help_text: Register at agent.qcc.com, get your API Key from the dashboard, and enter it as "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY"
auth.help_text_zh: 在 agent.qcc.com 注册账号，从控制台获取 API Key，输入格式为 "Bearer 你的API密钥"
